mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN T_IDM_USER wu ON wu.UIDNumber = t.writer_user_id LEFT JOIN T_IDM_GROUP wg ON wg.GroupCode = wu.DeptCode AND wg.CompanyCode = '0100004' LEFT JOIN T_IDM_USER pu ON pu.UIDNumber = t.plan_approver_user_id LEFT JOIN T_IDM_GROUP pg ON pg.GroupCode = pu.DeptCode AND pg.CompanyCode = '0100004' LEFT JOIN T_IDM_USER cu ON cu.UIDNumber = t.completion_approver_user_id LEFT JOIN T_IDM_GROUP cg ON cg.GroupCode = cu.DeptCode AND cg.CompanyCode = '0100004'

ISNULL(wg.GroupName, t.writer_team) AS writer_team_x, ISNULL(wu.UserName, t.writer_name) AS writer_name_x, ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = wu.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE'), t.writer_position) AS writer_position_x, ISNULL(pg.GroupName, t.plan_approver_team) AS plan_approver_team_x, ISNULL(pu.UserName, t.plan_approver_name) AS plan_approver_name_x, ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = pu.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE'), t.plan_approver_position) AS plan_approver_position_x, ISNULL(cg.GroupName, t.completion_approver_team) AS completion_approver_team_x, ISNULL(cu.UserName, t.completion_approver_name) AS completion_approver_name_x, ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = cu.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE'), t.completion_approver_position) AS completion_approver_position_x
mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, FROM tb_emergency_plan t
WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT t.*, FROM tb_emergency_plan t
WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT t.*, FROM tb_emergency_plan t
WHERE t.plan_type = #{planType} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE plan_type = #{planType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_emergency_plan WHERE plan_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_emergency_plan ( plan_id, plan_type, plan_name, description, response_steps, responsible_dept, responsible_name, training_start_date, training_end_date, resource_ids, checklist_template_id, notes, status, writer_user_id, writer_team, writer_position, writer_name, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, approved, reject_reason, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{planType}, #{planName}, #{description}, #{responseSteps}, #{responsibleDept}, #{responsibleName}, #{trainingStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{trainingEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{resourceIds}, #{checklistTemplateId}, #{notes}, #{status}, #{writerUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{writerTeam}, #{writerPosition}, #{writerName}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, 0, NULL, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET plan_type = #{planType}, plan_name = #{planName}, description = #{description}, response_steps = #{responseSteps}, responsible_dept = #{responsibleDept}, responsible_name = #{responsibleName}, training_start_date = #{trainingStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, training_end_date = #{trainingEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, resource_ids = #{resourceIds}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId}, notes = #{notes}, writer_user_id = #{writerUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, writer_team = #{writerTeam}, writer_position = #{writerPosition}, writer_name = #{writerName}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_emergency_plan SET status = #{status}, approved = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'PLAN' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{stage} = 'COMPLETION' AND #{approved} = 1 THEN #{approvedBy} ELSE completion_approved_by END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{rejectReason} IS NOT NULL THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, FROM tb_emergency_plan t
WHERE t.checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId} AND t.deleted = 0
